title: View Attributes
description: View attributes of the seat subsystem, defining first-person and third-person camera settings.

first_person_hud.description: List of HUD interface resources for first-person view.

first_person_offset.description: 3D offset for first-person view, based on the attached part's pose, x+right, y+up, z+back, in meters.

third_person_hud.description: List of HUD interface resources for third-person view.

third_person_offset.description: 3D offset for third-person view, based on the attached part's pose, x+right, y+up, z+back, in meters.

follow_vehicle.description: Whether the camera follows the vehicle movement.

focus_on_center.description: Whether to focus on the vehicle center.

min_pitch.description: Minimum pitch angle in degrees. Zero degrees is horizontal. For example, min_pitch=-30 means you can look down up to 30 degrees.

max_pitch.description: Maximum pitch angle in degrees. Zero degrees is horizontal. For example, max_pitch=60 means you can look up up to 60 degrees.

yaw_limit.description: Yaw angle limit in degrees. This represents the total angular range, so the actual yaw range will be [180 - yaw_limit/2, 180 + yaw_limit/2]. For example, yaw_limit=90 means ±45 degrees of horizontal movement.
